heading: Our Projects
subtitle: Support our mission to spread the light of Quranic knowledge across the globe
donateMessage: Your generous contributions enable us to continue providing free and affordable Quranic education to students worldwide. Every donation is a Sadaqah Jariyah — a continuous charity.

projects.title: Khayran Kaseer Project
projects.subtitle: NurulQuran Institute USA
projects.description: An initiative to establish and expand NurulQuran's presence in the United States, providing accessible Quranic education to Muslim communities across North America.

projects.title: Ramadan Ration Project
projects.description: Providing essential food supplies and rations to underprivileged families during the blessed month of Ramadan, ensuring no one goes hungry while fasting.

projects.title: General Donations & Zakat
projects.description: Support our ongoing operations, student scholarships, and community services through your generous donations and Zakat contributions.

volunteerMessage: Join our team of dedicated volunteers and contribute your skills to spreading the light of Quranic knowledge.
